tldr: Microsoft is implementing significant layoffs, cutting 4,800 jobs, primarily within its commercial sales and Xbox divisions.
Ukraine's President Zelenskyy called for "strong decisions" at an upcoming NATO summit following renewed Russian missile and drone attacks on Kyiv, which resulted in at least 19 deaths.
Iran began mass funeral processions for its former supreme leader, Ali Khamenei, drawing millions into the streets of Tehran.

market.why: The Nasdaq Composite closed down significantly, influenced by news that Microsoft is laying off 4,800 employees, with substantial cuts impacting its Xbox division and commercial sales business. The S&P 500 closed mostly flat.

yield_10y.why: No direct information was provided in the articles to explain the minor movement in the 10-year Treasury yield.

vix.why: No direct information was provided in the articles to explain the minor movement in the VIX.

tech.summary: Microsoft announced layoffs affecting 4,800 employees, approximately 2.1 percent of its workforce, with significant cuts in its commercial sales and Xbox divisions, including the sale of four Xbox studios.

Nintendo confirmed it will discontinue sales of all original Switch iterations in Europe next year, while also announcing new product revisions for the Switch 2 in Europe that will feature replaceable batteries.
Amazon is set to stop accepting new customers for its Mechanical Turk platform on July 30, marking a significant change for the crowdsourcing service.

world.summary: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy urged "strong decisions" at the upcoming NATO summit after Russia conducted extensive missile and drone strikes on Kyiv, resulting in 19 deaths and highlighting Ukraine's air defense challenges.
Iran commenced funeral processions for its former supreme leader, Ali Khamenei, in Tehran, an event that saw millions gather in a public display of mourning.
Hamas declared the dissolution of its governing body in Gaza, stating that a Palestinian technocratic committee would assume responsibility for the enclave's daily administration.
